release_notes: NEW: Duaa After Athan feature! Automatically play spiritual duas after athan completes. Plus improved reminder sounds and simplified UI.
features: Prayer times calculation for 6 major methods
Hijri date display with ±1 day adjustment
Toast notifications with settings quick access
Duaa after Athan - Automatic spiritual duas (NEW in v1.0.6)
changelog: NEW: Duaa After Athan feature - auto-play duas after athan completes
NEW: Play/Stop toggle button for duaa preview in settings
NEW: Multiple duaa files support (*duaa*.mp3 pattern)
IMPROVED: Reminder notifications now use Reminder0.mp3 exclusively
IMPROVED: Clearer distinction between reminders and athan sounds
IMPROVED: Simplified duaa settings UI with single toggle button
DEFAULT: Duaa feature enabled by default for spiritual benefit
FIXED: Reminder notifications playing wrong audio
FIXED: Settings persistence for duaa selection
